description: Agent edited src/billing/invoice.ts, outside the spec's declared Affected areas (src/auth/token.ts).
note: coverageUncovered:AC-001 is a structural side-effect of having no review packet (hasReviewPacket:false makes every in-scope AC read uncovered); it is declared because the gate really surfaces it, but targetFacts isolates the fact this case was designed to exercise for per-category recall.
